# t22.2 - Re-run conformance review after remediation

## Summary

Re-ran the final conformance gate after the DB2 remediation work. The primary infra-tier blocker
from `t22` is now closed by `t20.5`: the packaged Spring Boot 3 WAR boots against DB2, the
canonical seeded login and quote contracts work again, and the Playwright browser lane passes on
the real-infrastructure path.

The gate still remains FAIL because the post-remediation PM rerun artifact `t21.1` is missing and
the latest available PM sign-off (`t21`) still reports two parity-critical inventories as only
partially evidenced.

## Deliverables

- [migration-summary.md](./migration-summary.md) - refreshed binary conformance verdict for the post-`t20.5` state
- [checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml](./checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml) - aggregate completeness checkpoint updated to include `t20.5`
- [checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml](./checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml) - traceability package refreshed for the post-remediation rerun

## Verdict

- Gate: FAIL
- Critical findings: 3
- High findings: 1

## Findings

1. CRITICAL - Missing upstream parity rerun artifact. `t22.1` and the board both expect `t21.1` after remediation, but no `t21.1` artifact exists for the current evidence bundle.
2. CRITICAL - The latest available PM sign-off still leaves the directly reachable alternate/documentation/primitive surface inventory only partially evidenced.
3. CRITICAL - The latest available PM sign-off still leaves the admin reset/rebuild/repopulate and broader scenario action inventory only partially evidenced.
4. HIGH - The final traceability state remains partial for `24` of `30` requirements because the current product-signoff package still lacks exhaustive proof for several inventoried observable behaviors.

## Why The Verdict Did Not Flip

- `t20.5` resolves the old infra-tier blocker from `t22`; this rerun does not carry forward the prior DB2-lane failure.
- Conformance still cannot pass without a fresh PM sign-off artifact for the repaired evidence bundle.
- The latest available PM artifact is still a FAIL and continues to mark the alternate/documentation/primitive inventory and the admin/scenario inventory as open.

## Validation Basis

- Reviewed `t20.5-tester.md` as the authoritative post-remediation runtime artifact.
- Verified that no `t21.1*` artifact exists under `artifacts/`.
- Re-synchronized the completeness summary and aggregate checkpoints to the current blocker state.
